title: WeeklyPortfolioSnapshot
description: Lightweight weekly snapshot stored at snapshots/portfolio-weekly/{YYYY-WNN}.json on the repo-butler-data orphan branch. Keys are repository names; values are trimmed metric objects. computeTrends() in src/assess.js attaches a _week label to each entry at runtime — this field is never written to disk.

WeeklyRepoEntry.title: WeeklyRepoEntry
WeeklyRepoEntry.description: Trimmed metrics snapshot for a single repository at one point in time

open_issues.description: Open issue count at snapshot time (includes PRs — GitHub open_issues_count API quirk)

commits_6mo.description: Total commits in the previous 180 days at snapshot time

_week.description: ISO week label attached by computeTrends() at runtime; never stored on disk
